zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid Von Hirschberg於大約1215年出生時，她的父親Count of Hirschberg Gebhard V23歲，母親Agnes Mathilde von Württemberg18歲。她和Ludwig III von Oettingen至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格奧斯塔爾布可萊斯吉海姆 阿姆 里斯。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Hirschberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hanns, Manfred, Erwin, Gunter, Klaus, Raimund.  Jewish Aharon, Emanuel, Naftoli, Noson, Yerachmiel.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of several places called Hirschberg, from Middle High German hirz ‘deer, stag’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’, for example in Thuringia, North Rhine-Westphalia, or in western Poland (Jelenia Góra). In some instances the German surname may be topographic, from the same elements.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name composed of German Hirsch ‘deer’ + Berg ‘mountain, hill’ (see 1 above). Compare Hershberg and Hirshberg .

variants.name: Hershberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Yehoshua.
Americanized form of German Herschberg (see Herschberger ) or Hirschberg , and a variant of the same Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Hirshberg
meanings: Americanized form of German   Hirschberg  , and a variant of the same Jewish surname.

variants.name: Hirschberger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of several places called   Hirschberg  .
German: altered form of Swiss German   Hersberger  . Compare   Harshbarger  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): mainly an artificial name composed of German Hirsch ‘deer, hart’ + Berg ‘mountain, hill’ + the agent suffix -er, but possibly also habitational in some cases (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid Von Hirschberg was born about 1215, her father, Count of Hirschberg Gebhard V, was 23 and her mother, Agnes Mathilde von Württemberg, was 18. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Ludwig III von Oettingen. She was buried in Kirchheim am Ries, Ostalbkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid Von Hirschberg родилась около 1215 г., её отцу по имени Count of Hirschberg Gebhard V было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Mathilde von Württemberg, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Ludwig III von Oettingen. Она была похоронена в местности кирчхим ам риесь, осталбкрис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.
